name: CarShake Agent
description: Car reliability ratings and safety scores. Compare used cars by model year, check crash-test data, and find the safest vehicle for your budget.

skills.name: Compare Car Safety
skills.description: Compare safety ratings, reliability scores, and crash-test results across car models and years.
examples: Compare Toyota Camry vs Honda Accord

skills.name: Check Reliability
skills.description: Get detailed reliability ratings and common issues for a specific car model and year.
